title: Polish-Style Stir-Fried Chicken
description: A hearty and flavorful Polish-inspired stir-fry dish made with chicken, vegetables, and a hint of spices.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper and cook until they start to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the paprika, caraway seeds, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until the spices are fragrant.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables and spices.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the chicken is coated in the sauce.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
